options_notice.title: Finish setup in options
options_notice.description:
The thermostat "{name}" with {sensor} configured.

Please open the integration options after creation and add at least one controller. You can also configure other settings, HVAC modes, windows, and presets there.

error.invalid_temp_range: Invalid temperature range: Minimum has to be lower than Maximum

error.already_configured: Device with this name and temperature sensor already configured

init.title: Universal Thermostat overview

data_description.auto_cool_delta: Target temperature delta for Coolers in `auto` mode. Available only if `auto` HVAC mode is not disabled
data_description.auto_heat_delta: Target temperature delta for Heaters in `auto` mode. Available only if `auto` HVAC mode is not disabled
data_description.heat_cool_disabled: `heat/cool` mode will not be available if disabled
data_description.auto_mode_disabled: `auto` mode will not be available if disabled

controllers_menu.title: Controllers

controller_add.title: Adding heater/cooler
controller_add.description: You can also add the same entity as a cooler and a heater simultaneously (e.g. air conditioners or other devices with cooling and heating functions)

data.clear_pid_sample_period: Clear PID constant sample time period

data_description.ignore_windows: Ignore opening/closing windows if those configured
data_description.keep_alive: Use with heaters, coolers,  A/C units that shut off if they don’t receive a signal from their remote for a while.
data_description.cold_tolerance: Negative difference from the target temperature at which heater will be turned on (cooler will be turned off)
data_description.hot_tolerance: Positive difference from the target temperature at which heater will be turned off (cooler will be turned on)
data_description.target_temp_delta: Delta between Universal Thermostat and target climate entity set points
data_description.min_cycle_duration: Use to protect from often on/off cycling
data_description.pwm_period: Switch will be turned on and turned off according internal PID output once in this period.
data_description.clear_keep_alive: Use this switch to reset/delete keep alive interval field value
data_description.clear_target_temp_delta: Use this switch to reset/delete target temperature delta field value
data_description.clear_min_cycle_duration: Use this switch to reset/delete minimum cycle duration field value
data_description.clear_pid_sample_period: Use this switch to reset/delete PID constant sample time period field value
data_description.clear_min: Use this switch to reset/delete minimum PID field value
data_description.clear_max: Use this switch to reset/delete maximum PID field value
data_description.clear_switch_entity_id: Use this switch to reset/delete switch entity field

controller_edit.title: Edit heater/cooler
controller_edit.description: Choose controller you want to edit

controller_remove.title: Remove heater/cooler
controller_remove.description: Choose controller you want to remove from Thermostat

windows_menu.title: Windows
windows_menu.description:
You can add any **binary device** (like door/window/presence binary sensors or any other similar entities) to prevent/pause heating/cooling when its state is `on` (or `off` for inverted window, e.g. presence).
You 

Configured windows:
{windows}

window_add.title: Adding window
window_add.description: Choose **binary entity** as a **window** and its settings

data_description.inverted: If inverted - controllers will stop when **window** is `off`. Use with presence sensors or any entities with similar inverted logic
data_description.timeout: Time period to wait until stop/start controller after **window** opening/closing (`on`/`off`)

window_remove.title: Remove window
window_remove.description: Choose **window** you want to remove from Thermostat

data_description.inverted: If inverted - controllers will stop when **window** is `off`. Use with presence sensors or any entities with similar inverted logic
data_description.timeout: Time period to wait until stop/start controller after **window** opening/closing (`on`/`off`)

presets_menu.title: Presets

preset_add.title: Adding preset
preset_add.description:
Add name and type for new **preset**

**Single temperature delta** - changes thermostat target temperature (or temperatures in `heat/cool` mode)

**Heating/cooling temperature deltas** - changes thermostat heating and cooling target temperatures

**Target temperatures** - sets particular thermostat target temperatures

data_description.temp_delta: Changes thermostat target temperature(s): adds positive number/subtract negative number

data_description.heat_delta: Changes thermostat target temperature in `heat` mode, or low target temperature in `heat/cool` mode, or adds to `auto_heat_delta` in `auto` mode: adds positive number/subtract negative number
data_description.cool_delta: Changes thermostat target temperature in `cool` mode, or high target temperature in `heat/cool` mode, or adds to `auto_cool_delta` in `auto` mode: adds positive number/subtract negative number

preset_config_target_temp.title: Configure preset
preset_config_target_temp.description:
Configuring target temperatures preset: **{current_preset}**

At least one target must be configured

data_description.target_temp: Changes target temperature to a fixed value if preset's Cooling/Heating target temperatures not configured
data_description.heat_target_temp: Changes target temperature to a fixed value for `heat` mode, low_target for `heat/cool` mode and creates invisible target temp for heaters in `auto` mode
data_description.cool_target_temp: Changes target temperature to a fixed value for `cool` mode, high_target for `heat/cool` mode and creates invisible target temp for coolers in `auto` mode

preset_remove.title: Remove preset
preset_remove.description: Choose **preset** you want to remove from Thermostat
